Title: Security Baseline Hardening
Description: Sichere Defaults und Schutz der Expositionsflächen.

Title: API Auth Enforcement
Description: PUBLIC_API_TOKEN außerhalb development verpflichtend; Startup-Fail ohne Token.

Title: Session Hardening
Description: Secure cookies, proxy trust, session secret rotation policy.
Rollback Strategy: Env toggle nur für local dev
Observability Requirement: Session config metrics, auth error logs

Title: Test DB Isolation
Description: DB pro Worker/Suite, single-init guard, lock-free test runtime.
Observability Requirement: Test stability metrics, lock error counters

Title: Clock/UUID Abstractions
Observability Requirement: Flaky rate metrics, deterministic seed logs

Title: Release Gates
Description: CI-Gates: tests, contract checks, migration checks, smoke runs.

Title: Separate Entrypoints
Rollback Strategy: Monolith startup retained behind fallback script

Title: Health/Readiness
Description: /healthz + readiness pro Runtime mit dependency checks.
Rollback Strategy: Health endpoints can run in passive mode

Title: Constraint Test Baseline
Rollback Strategy: Rule toggles per package until fully enforced

Title: Auditability Stream
Description: Structured audit stream for governance, security, compliance events.
